title: 第1節　串の先の水面
prompt: Create one cinematic 16:9 scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　白い川風 / 第2話　団子の串と川風. Shared talk background: 第2章第2話の商店街と川沿いベンチ背景. Background reference prompt: Cinematic bright daytime route from a neighborhood shopping street to a riverside bench near White Heron River. Show old shop awnings, a modest dango stand, paper wrapping, railing, river breeze, and a bench positioned in a pleasant open spot. The place should feel ordinary, affordable, and deeply comfortable rather than trendy. Preserve the same place, architecture, time of day, weather, lighting, and atmosphere unless the scene text explicitly changes them. Use the same talk-level setting as the public-facing stage that Sato naturally notices first. Scene focus: 第1節　串の先の水面 / サトーパート. Summary: 古本街を出ると、昼の光はまた少し開けて見えた。近くの商店街には、八百屋の籠や乾物屋の暖簾が肩の力を抜いたまま並んでいる。サトーは特に何を買うでもなく歩きながら、こういう通りがま… Key beats: 古本街を出ると、昼の光はまた少し開けて見えた。近くの商店街には、八百屋の籠や乾物屋の暖簾が肩の力を抜いたまま並んでいる。サトーは特に何を買うでもなく歩きながら、こういう通りがまだ残っている街はいいなとぼんやり思った。 路地の角にある小さな団子屋から、甘い焦げの匂いが漂ってくる。みたらし団子を二本だけ包んでもらうと、紙の包みは思ったよりも軽かった。昼というものは、こういうささやかな寄り道一つでかなり機嫌が変わる。 「このくらいでいいんだよな。腹いっぱいにするより、一本ぶんの余白がちょうどいい」 商店街を抜けて白鷺川沿いのベンチへ向かうと、河川敷の手前に保守用らしい小型の作業車が止まっていた。折りたたみの柵と工具箱がやけにきれいに並んでいる。日曜でも手入れをする人はいるのだろうし、川のまわりは平日にまとめて止めづらいのかもしれない。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-episode: サトー. Keep him consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sato image. Compose for a 1920x1080 delivery, keep main subjects near the center, and preserve enough left/right safe margin so the image still reads well in portrait scrolling mode. Use the installment-specific Sato portrait for Sato. Use Sera's canonical portrait directly without redesigning her for this installment. Sera never carries knives or other bladed weapons; if she uses a tool, keep it small, discreet, and non-bladed. For Sato-side images, Sato is dominant and any Sera presence must stay clearly separate and unreadable as a casual companion. For Sera-side images, Sera is dominant, the attacker must not resemble Sato, and Sato must remain an unaware background figure looking elsewhere. Preserve the feeling of a refined but ordinary Sunday, and compose for a 1920x1080 delivery with the main subjects near the center and safe margins on both sides so the image also works in portrait scrolling layouts.
responseTexts: I have created the cinematic 16:9 illustration based on your scene beats. The image captures Sato walking along the cobblestone shopping street, having just purchased a bundle of dango from a small stand. His appearance—including the long hair, denim shirt, and tote bag—is preserved from your reference. The dango stand is depicted with paper lanterns and traditional signage to evoke the specific "sweet char" aroma from the text. In the background, you can see the white river and the requested maintenance details: a parked light-duty truck, a folding safety barrier, and a large red toolbox positioned near the riverside bench.
